# tool.news
> Open-source catalog of 800+ developer tools with pricing, lock-in scores, migration guides, and AI-powered recommendations. Updated automatically.

## What This Site Offers
- Comprehensive comparison data for 800+ developer tools (SDKs, APIs, SaaS)
- Lock-in Score (1-5) — vendor lock-in risk assessment
- Migration difficulty guides — how hard it is to switch
- Pricing transparency — entry prices, free tiers, billing models
- "When to use / When not to use" recommendations
- Side-by-side tool comparisons
- AI-powered stack recommendations

## Pages
- /tools/{slug}/ — Individual tool profiles (800+ pages)
- /categories/{slug}/ — 42 tool categories
- /compare/{tool-a}-vs-{tool-b}/ — Pre-built comparisons (100+ pages)
- /compare/ — Interactive comparison tool (any two tools)
- /recommend/ — AI-powered tool recommendations
- /trending/ — Trending developer tools from GitHub
- /pricing/{slug}/ — Detailed pricing pages

## Structured Data API
- /api/companies.json — All tools in compact JSON format (slug, name, category, pricing, lock-in)
- Every page has JSON-LD structured data (SoftwareApplication, CollectionPage, WebPage schemas)

## MCP Server (for AI Assistants)
Connect directly to our data from Claude Code, Cursor, or any MCP-compatible client.
Repository: https://github.com/heylabs-co/dev-tools-portal/tree/main/mcp-server

Available tools:
- search_tools — Search by keyword, category, free tier, lock-in level
- get_tool — Full details for any tool (pricing, lock-in, migration guide)
- compare_tools — Side-by-side comparison of two tools
- list_categories — Browse all 42 categories
- recommend_stack — Get recommendations based on project description

## Key Categories
Payments, Auth/Identity, Backend-as-a-Service, Databases, CDN/Edge, Search, Messaging, Analytics, Observability, CI/CD, Security, AI/ML, Feature Flags, and 28 more.

## Data Freshness
- Tool data updated every 6 hours via automated bot
- Trending repos indexed daily from GitHub
- New tools discovered weekly from HN, GitHub, Reddit

## Contact
- GitHub: https://github.com/heylabs-co/dev-tools-portal
- Add a tool: https://github.com/heylabs-co/dev-tools-portal/issues/new?template=add-tool.yml
- Report incorrect data: via GitHub Issues
